title: mirabilis oxybaphoides
intro: Mirabilis oxybaphoides, also known as the Mexican gold poppy or moonflower, is a flowering plant species in the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). The medicinal properties of Mirabilis oxybaphoides lie in its roots, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. This plant is said to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Mirabilis oxybaphoides is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
